text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, September 15. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Having dinner with our friends tonight. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Catan is always a good time. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Meal planning saves so much time. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that modified the smart-home alert integrations. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. That is a clean implementation. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Sounds exciting! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that doing some cleaning around the house. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. I can help troubleshoot that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reading a new book before bed. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Good way to wrap up the day. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Catan is always a good time. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've got the grocery list ready. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. That is a clean implementation. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Sounds exciting! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Bedtime can be a challenge. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that checking on some house maintenance items. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Automations are great when they work. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. I've adjusted the local settings. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
